title: Consistency tokens in the reactor guarantee read-after-write correctness by capturing operation coordinates from writes
content: Every reactor write operation returns a `JobInfo` containing a `ConsistencyToken` with `version`, `createdAtUtcIso`, and `coordinates` (array of `{ documentId, scope, branch, operationIndex }`). Passing this token to subsequent reads guarantees you see the effects of the write: `await reactor.get(docId, undefined, token)`. Without a consistency token, reads may return stale data if read models haven't indexed the latest operations. `IReactorClient` handles this automatically by waiting for `READ_READY` before returning, but `IReactor` requires explicit token management.
description: Every write returns a ConsistencyToken with document/scope/branch/operationIndex coordinates for subsequent reads.
